description: An offshore installation manager needs to generate a POB (Personnel on Board) list for an emergency muster drill.

nodes.task_description: Access the personnel logistics system to get a real-time list of everyone currently on the offshore platform.

expected_outcome.expected: A complete list of all personnel currently on board is generated.

nodes.task_description: Filter the list to show each person's assigned muster station.

expected_outcome.expected: The POB list is updated to include the correct muster station for each individual.

nodes.task_description: Transmit the list to the emergency response leader's tablet for the drill.

expected_outcome.expected: The list is successfully sent and received for use in the muster drill.
